title: GeoNames connector configuration
description: Loads a GeoNames country dump as reference places keyed on geonames_id.

country.title: Country code
country.description: ISO-3166 alpha-2 country code, e.g. 'VA' or 'MC'.

path.title: Local dump path
path.description: DEV/OFFLINE ONLY: path to a local {CC}.txt dump that overrides the live download. NOT a security boundary — this schema also drives the self-service config form, so the runtime confines the path to GEONAMES_ALLOWED_PATH_DIR (realpath-inside-allowlist, defeating absolute/../symlink escapes) and a GEONAMES_MAX_PATH_BYTES size cap. Leave unset (and GEONAMES_ALLOWED_PATH_DIR unset = default-deny) in production.
